sqlMap.select: SELECT taskid, parentid, ownerid, creatorid, case when #primary# = 1 then creatorname else creatorName2 end as creatorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createDate, taskstatus, completerate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(completedate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as completedate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as enddate, repetition, repetitiondelete, repetitionstatus, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, newanswer, newrefer, personid, case when #primary# = 1 then personname else personname2 end as personname, case when #primary# = 1 then persondeptname else personDeptName2 end as persondeptname, personattach, personcontentpath, taskpersonid, case when #primary# = 1 then taskpersonname else taskPersonName2 end as taskpersonname FROM TBL_TASK WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT commentid, commentorid, case when #primary# = 1 then commentorname else commentorname2 end as commentorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(commentdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as commentdate, comment FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT sharerid, case when #primary# = 1 then sharername else sharername2 end as sharername, case when #primary# = 1 then sharerdeptname else sharerdeptname2 end as sharerdeptname FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
SELECT delaycolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #memberID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (userid, delaycolor, autodelete, tenantid) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #autoDelete#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET delaycolor = #delayColor#, autodelete = #autoDelete# WHERE userid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
